sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rothblatt, United Therapeutics CEO, sells $5.1m in UTHR stock
feed.summary: Martine Rothblatt, Chairperson & CEO of United Therapeutics Corp (NASDAQ:UTHR), sold approximately $5.1 million worth of company stock on March 25, 2026, while also exercising stock options for 9,500 shares. These transactions were executed under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. The article also highlights recent company news, including a $2 billion share repurchase program and positive results from a phase 3 study for nebulized Tyvaso.

feed.title: ROK stock $354.82 close Mar 26, 2026 NYSE Rockwell Automation, Inc.: AI demand underpins outlook
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) closed at $354.82 on March 26, 2026, experiencing a slight decline despite recent earnings beats and a focus on AI-led growth. The company reported strong fiscal Q1 results, driven by software and services, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating, though valuation remains a point of debate. Meyka AI projects a yearly target of $366.44 and a monthly target of $347.80, with a B+ grade, highlighting both growth potential and risks associated with its high valuation and cyclical demand.

feed.title: Federal Report: Faulty Gas Pipes Caused Deadly Mississippi Home Explosions
feed.summary: A federal investigation found that two deadly natural gas explosions in Jackson, Mississippi, were caused by underground pipes disconnecting due to expanding clay soil. The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) criticized Atmos Energy Corp. for inadequate safety protocols, delayed repairs, and insufficient training, despite being aware of the soil conditions and prior leaks. The NTSB recommended broader oversight for Atmos Energy and immediate replacement of vulnerable pipe connections.

feed.title: Eric W. Thornburg Joins Tetra Tech Board, Named to Compensation and Governance Committees
feed.summary: Tetra Tech (TTEK) has appointed Eric W. Thornburg to its Board of Directors, effective March 30, 2026. He will also serve on the Compensation Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. Thornburg's background includes serving as CEO and Chair for H2O America and Connecticut Water Service, and he was previously a VP at American Water Works.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (TMCI) and Encourages Investors to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into potential corporate wrongdoing by Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (TMCI) and its officers/directors. The firm is encouraging investors who purchased Treace Medical securities prior to May 8, 2023, and still hold them, to join the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC, a nationally recognized firm specializing in securities fraud class actions, operates on a contingency fee basis.

feed.title: Trip.com Group (TCOM) Shares Crater Amid Questions Over AI Price Adjustment Tool, Anti-Monopoly Regulatory Probe; Securities Class Action Pending -- Hagens Berman
feed.summary: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against Trip.com Group (TCOM) following a 17% drop in its American Depositary Shares after the company announced an anti-monopoly investigation by Chinese regulators. The lawsuit alleges that Trip.com misled investors regarding the regulatory risks associated with its AI price adjustment tool, which purportedly forced price reductions on hotel partners and suppressed competition. Hagens Berman is investigating the matter, urging investors with significant losses to come forward.

feed.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) Price Prediction: 21Shares TDOG ETF Debuts on Nasdaq With SEC Commodity Backing
feed.summary: The 21Shares TDOG ETF, the first Dogecoin Foundation-backed ETF, has launched on Nasdaq, providing institutional investors with regulated exposure to DOGE. Despite this, Dogecoin's price remains significantly below its late-2024 peak, leading some investors to explore alternative yield protocols like Taurox IO, a decentralized hedge fund utilizing AI agents for trading. Taurox IO aims to offer returns through execution rather than market sentiment, with its presale ongoing and promising substantial returns for early investors.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Announces Leadership Changes in Its Operations Function
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has announced that Toby Clements will become its new senior executive vice president and chief operations officer, overseeing the company's client service centers and global operations starting April 13. Clements, who has been with U.S. Bank since 2017, will succeed Souheil Badran, who is retiring. The CEO, Gunjan Kedia, expressed confidence in Clements' leadership and vision.

feed.title: [8-K] TETRA TECH INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Tetra Tech, Inc. announced the appointment of Eric W. Thornburg to its Board of Directors, effective March 30, 2026. Thornburg, a veteran of the water industry and former CEO of H20 America and Connecticut Water Service, will join the Compensation Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. As a non-employee director, he will receive an annual cash retainer, meeting fees, and an annual long-term equity award.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Edward Werner Sells 1,000 Shares of F5 Inc (FFIV)
feed.summary: Edward Werner, CFO of a branch of F5 Inc (FFIV), sold 1,000 shares of the company on March 25, 2026, reducing his holding to 4,305 shares. This sale is part of a pattern of insider selling at F5, with no insider buys and 43 insider sells over the past year. The stock is considered modestly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.31, trading at $300 against a GF Value of $228.67.

feed.title: Apple adds Bosch, Cirrus Logic, others to US manufacturing program, to invest $400 million
feed.summary: Apple is expanding its American Manufacturing Program by adding Bosch, Cirrus Logic, TDK, and Qnity Electronics, planning to invest $400 million through 2030. This initiative aims to boost U.S.-based production of key components like sensors and integrated circuits, aligning with a broader trend of shifting supply chains to reduce geopolitical risks. The expansion is expected to create jobs and strengthen domestic semiconductor and advanced electronics manufacturing capabilities.

feed.title: Laird Superfood falls 10% after posting wider-than-anticipated Q4 loss
feed.summary: Laird Superfood (NYSE American:LSF) reported a wider-than-anticipated Q4 loss of -$0.16 per share, significantly missing analyst estimates of -$0.07, causing shares to fall by 10.3%. Despite the earnings miss, the company's revenue of $13.3 million topped expectations and grew 15% year-over-year. The increased loss was attributed to professional fees from the Navitas Organics acquisition and higher procurement costs due to commodity inflation and tariffs.

feed.title: Top Pool Executive Quietly Unloads Shares in Notable Insider Move
feed.summary: Jennifer Neil, Senior Vice President, Secretary, and Chief Legal Officer at Pool (POOL), recently sold 508 shares of company stock worth $103,428. This insider transaction comes as analysts have revisited their outlook on Pool Corp., citing concerns about softening pool construction trends and broader housing market headwinds. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates POOL as Neutral, noting weakening financial trends offset by improved leverage and a reasonable P/E with a supportive dividend yield.

feed.title: SunOpta (NASDAQ: STKL) counsel exercises PSUs; shares withheld for tax
feed.summary: SunOpta Inc.'s General Counsel, Christopher McCullough, exercised 11,747 Performance Stock Units (PSUs), converting them into Common Shares. A portion of these shares (5,584) were withheld by the company to cover income tax obligations at a price of $6.47 per share. Following these transactions, McCullough directly owns 17,234 Common Shares, which includes 1,141 shares previously acquired through the Employee Stock Purchase Plan that had not been reported until now.

feed.title: Silvaco Group, Inc. Common Stock (SVCO) Stock Price Today & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of Silvaco Group, Inc. (SVCO) common stock, including its market performance, financial fundamentals, and company overview. It details how to buy SVCO stock on the Gotrade app, outlines minimum investment requirements, and addresses dividend policies. The report also offers guidance on evaluating if SVCO stock is expensive or cheap and notes that the company does not currently pay dividends as it reinvests profits for growth.

feed.title: Turbo Energy (NASDAQ: TURB) director submits initial Form 3 report
feed.summary: Turbo Energy, S.A. (NASDAQ: TURB) director Valldecabres Polop Miguel has filed an initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership (Form 3) with the SEC. This filing indicates his status as a director but reports no stock transactions or derivative positions, serving as a baseline disclosure for his insider status. The report details his address in Valencia, Spain, and the date of the event requiring the statement as March 18, 2026.

feed.title: Trump Blasts Democrats Like Chuck Schumer As He Vows To 'Immediately' Pay TSA Agents To Fix Emergency: Airline Stocks Spike Overnight
feed.summary: President Trump announced he would sign an executive order to immediately pay Transportation Security Administration (TSA) agents amidst a partial government shutdown and mounting airport chaos. This move aims to address the financial strain on TSA workers and critical staffing shortages, which have led to significant airport delays. The announcement comes as airline stocks, including American Airlines Group, Delta Air Lines, and United Airlines Holdings, saw a spike in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin to 'dramatically' ramp up missile production under new deal with feds
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin will significantly increase its production of precision strike missiles following a new framework agreement with the U.S. Department of Defense. This expansion builds on a previous $4.94 billion contract from 2025 and aims to meet growing demand, particularly in light of the ongoing war with Iran. The agreement also includes an option for a multi-year contract for up to seven years, pending congressional approval.

feed.title: Pfizer Inc (PFE): Our Calculation of Intrinsic Value
feed.summary: This article provides a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis of Pfizer Inc. (PFE), calculating an intrinsic value per share of $14–$15, which suggests the stock is currently overvalued by about 45% compared to its current price of $27. While Pfizer is a high-quality pharmaceutical company with strong R&D, it faces challenges from patent expirations and the normalization of revenues post-COVID-19. The analysis concludes that Pfizer is not yet a deep value play, with future returns depending on dividend yield, pipeline breakthroughs, and gradual earnings recovery.

feed.title: SIGA Technologies declares $0.60 special dividend per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: SIGA Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:SIGA) has announced a special cash dividend of $0.60 per share, payable on April 23, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 7, 2026. This dividend matches the previous year's special dividend and reflects the company's strong balance sheet and focus on shareholder value, despite trading near its 52-week low. The company, a commercial-stage pharmaceutical firm, recently reported a Q4 2025 loss but demonstrated overall annual strength with a net income of $23 million and a solid cash balance.

feed.title: Sprouts Farmers (SFM) Ascends While Market Falls: Some Facts to Note
feed.summary: Sprouts Farmers (SFM) closed up 2.67% at $77.27 on the most recent trading day, outperforming the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq, which all saw declines. The company's shares have risen 2.08% over the last month, against a loss for the broader Retail-Wholesale sector, and analysts project a 3.99% revenue growth for its upcoming earnings report. Sprouts Farmers currently holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and a Forward P/E ratio of 13.61, aligning with the industry average.

feed.title: CCORF Maintains Bank of Montreal(BMO.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $162.04
feed.summary: CCORF analyst Matthew Lee has reiterated a Buy rating for Bank of Montreal (BMO.US) and maintained a target price of $162.04. The analyst has a notable success rate of 64.0% and an average return of 18.0% over the past year. This information is provided for educational purposes and is not investment advice.

feed.title: Here's What to Expect From UnitedHealth's Next Earnings Report
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings, with analysts expecting a profit of $6.62 per share, an 8.1% decrease year-over-year. The company's shares have significantly underperformed the S&P 500 and the healthcare sector ETF over the past year, partly due to challenges like higher medical costs and declining Medicare Advantage enrollment. Despite these issues, Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating, projecting a potential upside of 33.9% from current levels.

feed.title: Why ConocoPhillips (COP) Is Up 5.7% After Raising Security Concerns Over Qatari Energy Assets
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) shares rose 5.7% after its CEO raised security concerns about Qatari energy assets amidst escalating Middle East conflicts. The company has significant investments in LNG and oil projects in Qatar, which are susceptible to geopolitical risks. This situation underscores the importance of regional stability for ConocoPhillips' operations, as it balances these risks with its focus on delivering large capital projects and potentially divesting Permian assets to fund them.

feed.title: Alyssa Henry joins PayPal (PYPL) insider ranks with initial Form 3 filing
feed.summary: PayPal director Alyssa Henry has filed an initial Form 3, signaling her official status as an insider. This is a routine compliance filing and does not report any purchases, sales, or other equity transactions. The form establishes her reporting status with the SEC and confirms her directorship at PayPal Holdings, Inc.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Is Up 33% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has seen a 33% increase in its stock price year-to-date, driven by signs of stabilization and recovery in residential solar markets. Despite a recent revenue miss and insider stock sale, institutional investors are increasing their stakes, anticipating improved demand and margins. A valuation model suggests a target price of $50, implying a 16% upside over the next 2.8 years, primarily due to demand recovery, margin rebuilding, and growth in energy storage.

feed.title: Book value per share of Coterra Energy Inc. – MIL:1CTRA
feed.summary: The article displays the book value per share for Coterra Energy Inc. (MIL:1CTRA) on Euronext Milan. It provides financial data and refers to market data from ICE Data Services and reference data from FactSet. The content is presented in the context of TradingView's platform, offering financial tools and community features.

feed.title: Do Softer Results At First Solar (FSLR) Challenge The Foundation Of Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) recently presented at the 38th Annual Roth Conference, where softer quarterly results led investors to question the durability of its business momentum. The company's investment narrative relies on the continued growth of utility-scale solar and U.S. policy support. While a new US$1.5 billion credit facility provides financial flexibility, short-term concerns about margins and volumes, along with trade policy risks, continue to influence investor perspectives.

feed.title: SunOpta (STKL) CHRO Duzan exercises 7,076 PSUs; 2,713 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: SunOpta Inc.'s CHRO, Danielle Marie Duzan, exercised 7,076 Performance Stock Units (PSUs), converting them into common shares. To cover income tax withholding, 2,713 shares were withheld by the company, leaving her with 4,363 directly held common shares. This transaction was an administrative disposition for tax purposes and not an open-market sale.

feed.title: SunOpta (STKL) SVP nets new shares after PSU vesting and taxes
feed.summary: SunOpta Inc.'s SVP of Supply Chain, Justin Kobler, exercised 12,236 Performance Stock Units (PSUs) into common shares. To cover income tax withholding, 5,586 shares were withheld by the company at $6.47 per share, an action classified as a non-market tax payment rather than an open-market sale. After these transactions, Kobler directly holds 37,437 SunOpta common shares, reflecting routine compensation and tax treatment.

feed.title: Village Farms Int’l: President Bovenschen sells $144,500 in shares
feed.summary: Orville Bovenschen, President of Canadian Cannabis at Village Farms International, Inc. (NASDAQ:VFF), sold 50,000 common shares totaling $144,500 on March 25, 2026, leaving him with zero direct shares. This insider sale follows the company's fourth-quarter 2025 earnings miss, where both EPS and revenue fell short of analyst expectations, despite a strong year-over-year stock performance. The VFF stock trades at $2.73, down 25% year-to-date, with a P/E ratio of 15.19 and a market cap of $317 million.

feed.title: Rapid7 Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Rapid7, Inc. announced inducement awards to employees and contractors of Kenzo Security, Inc. following its acquisition of Kenzo on March 26, 2026. These awards, comprising restricted stock units (RSUs) and performance-based restricted stock units (PSUs), were granted as a material inducement for Kenzo personnel to join Rapid7. The grants were approved by Rapid7's Compensation Committee in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

feed.title: Village Farms (VFF) cannabis president sells 50,000 common shares
feed.summary: Orville Bovenschen, President of Canadian Cannabis at Village Farms International (VFF), sold 50,000 common shares in open-market transactions for personal financial planning. The shares were sold at an average price of $2.89, reducing his direct holdings in the company to zero. This transaction was disclosed in an SEC Form 4 filing on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Is It Time To Revisit Valley National Bancorp (VLY) After Its 41% One-Year Rally?
feed.summary: Valley National Bancorp (VLY) has seen a 41.5% rally over the last year, prompting a valuation review. Using an Excess Returns model, the stock appears 53.5% undervalued with an estimated intrinsic value of US$26.20 per share. The company also seems undervalued based on its P/E ratio of 11.92x compared to Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 14.17x, despite being slightly above the industry average.

feed.summary: This article displays the net margin percentage for MDJM Ltd. (OTC: UOKAF) on TradingView. It presents financial data for the company under the "Hotels/Resorts/Cruise lines" sector, indicating the market is currently closed. However, no specific net margin values are provided in the content.

feed.title: Free float of Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. – BOATS:SVAQW
feed.summary: This article provides details about the free float of Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (SVAQW). It is a financial listing focused on market data for the company's stock. The content primarily lists relevant financial and market information, indicating it is a part of a larger financial data platform.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment — Construction Partners (NASDAQ: ROAD)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares of Construction Partners Inc. common stock following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment means that certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies that Vanguard itself no longer beneficially owns these shares, with individual subsidiaries to disclose their positions in future filings.

feed.title: Truist Raises Price Target on Ryman Hospitality Properties to $129 From $121, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist has increased its price target for Ryman Hospitality Properties (RHP) to $129 from $121, while maintaining a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst activities, including Deutsche Bank also maintaining a "Buy" rating with a target of $133, and a recent successful offering of $700 million in senior notes by Ryman. The company specializes in upscale convention center resorts and entertainment experiences, with strong financial performance reflected in its latest earnings report and dividend declaration.

feed.title: Reliance Global Group (EZRA) CEO buys 300K shares in open market
feed.summary: Reliance Global Group's (EZRA) Chairman and CEO, Ezra Beyman, recently purchased 300,000 shares of common stock in the open market at a price of $0.1699 per share. This transaction increased his direct holdings to over 959,000 shares, with additional indirect holdings through YES Americana Group, LLC and Reliance Global Holdings, LLC. The move signals a positive net-buy insider activity for EZRA.

feed.title: Vanguard amends Schedule 13G/A for Gibraltar Industries (NYSE: ROCK) — reports 0 shares
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Gibraltar Industries (NYSE: ROCK), reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which disaggregated certain Vanguard subsidiaries for separate reporting in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538, meaning Vanguard no longer beneficially owns the securities held by these reclassified entities. The filing is an administrative reclassification rather than a market transaction.

feed.title: Simplify's US Equity ETF Shifts to Monthly Distributions
feed.summary: The Simplify US Equity PLUS ETF (SPUC) is transitioning from quarterly to monthly distributions starting April 2026, aiming to provide a more consistent income stream for shareholders. This actively managed fund utilizes an "Upside Convexity" strategy that employs systematic call options to capitalize on strong market appreciation, while its core holdings track the S&P 500. Despite the shift to monthly payouts, the fund's strategy of seeking disproportionate gains during market advances remains unchanged.

feed.title: Reynolds Consumer Products Director Buys Shares in March 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: A director at Reynolds Consumer Products, Rolf Stangl, purchased 4,705 common shares worth approximately $99,000 on March 18, increasing his direct holdings to 39,537 shares. This acquisition aligns with his previous pattern of open-market purchases and occurs as the company experiences resilient financial performance with stable revenue and anticipated modest earnings improvement in 2026, despite a 9% share decline over the past year.

feed.title: Arcadia Biosciences' Q4 revenue falls 26%, net loss narrows
feed.summary: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) reported a 26% decrease in its fourth-quarter revenue, though its net loss for the period narrowed. The article, sourced from Reuters, provides this financial update for the company.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs, Citi Raise Verizon (VZ) Targets, Highlight Shift to EBITDA and Cash Flow Focus
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and Citi have both raised their price targets for Verizon (VZ) to $55, maintaining a Buy rating. Analysts highlight Verizon's strategic shift toward focusing on EBITDA and free cash flow, alongside new segment reporting and efforts to streamline costs and expand converged services. The company is anticipated to return to annual service revenue growth by 2027.

feed.title: QuickLogic Corp Stock: Embedded FPGA Solutions Driving Edge AI Innovation for North American Investo
feed.summary: QuickLogic Corp specializes in ultra-low power embedded FPGAs, playing a crucial role in edge AI and IoT applications for the North American tech market. The company offers eFPGA intellectual property (IP) and System-on-Chips (SoCs), enabling efficient, customizable processing at the edge for industries like consumer electronics, industrial IoT, and defense, without heavy reliance on cloud infrastructure. Strategic partnerships, RISC-V compatibility, and the QuickAI accelerator lineup position QuickLogic for continued growth and interest from investors looking for exposure to the burgeoning edge computing market.

feed.title: Papa Johns (NASDAQ: PZZA) CAO reports routine tax share withholding
feed.summary: Caroline Miller Oyler, Chief Administrative Officer of Papa Johns International (NASDAQ: PZZA), reported a routine tax share withholding where 714 shares of common stock, valued at $33.12 each, were disposed of on March 25, 2026, to cover tax obligations. This was a tax-withholding transaction, not an open-market sale. Following this adjustment, Oyler directly owns 65,001 shares and indirectly holds an additional 685.13 shares through a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: A Multi-Factor Approach to U.S. Small-Cap Investing
feed.summary: This article introduces the iShares U.S. Small-Cap Equity Factor ETF (SMLF), a systematic fund designed for exposure to U.S. small-cap stocks. It employs a multi-factor approach, combining quality, value, momentum, and low volatility to mitigate inherent market volatility and enhance risk-adjusted returns. The SMLF ETF maintains a competitive expense ratio and semi-annual rebalancing to align with its defined factor criteria.

feed.title: Real Brokerage Inc forms partnership to enhance compliance and connection rates for agents
feed.summary: Real Brokerage Inc has partnered with Contact Center Compliance to improve regulatory adherence and operational efficiency for its agents. This collaboration will ensure agents comply with TCPA and DNC regulations by providing tools for instantly scrubbing calling lists and real-time number verification. The initiative aims to streamline communications, boost connection rates, and reinforce the company's focus on strengthening agent support and community.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; D-Wave Quantum (NYSE: QBTS) shows 0%
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, indicating zero beneficial ownership of D-Wave Quantum (NYSE: QBTS) Common Stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, and is based on SEC guidance for disaggregated reporting. The filing explicitly states 0% of class owned and no voting or dispositive powers.

feed.title: PayPal (PYPL) director Alyssa Henry granted 1,210-share equity award
feed.summary: PayPal director Alyssa Henry has received a fully vested equity award of 1,210 shares of common stock, granted at no cash cost. This compensation is part of the company's Independent Director Compensation Policy, representing her prorated annual equity award based on a value of $54,246.58. Following this transaction, Henry directly holds 1,210 shares of PayPal.
